title: ChainGraph Artifact Envelope
description: The JSON envelope every ChainGraph-conformant decision tool emits. See The ChainGraph Standard v0.1 §5-§7. CC BY 4.0, Post Oak Labs.

chaingraph_version.description: The Standard version this artifact targets (e.g. '0.1.0'). REQUIRED at L1 for new implementations.

ap2_version.description: Optional compatibility alias for implementations migrating from the AINumbers internal schema. New implementations SHOULD prefer chaingraph_version.

mandate_type.description: What the artifact decides. A core registry value (§7.3) or a namespaced extension value '<reverse-dns-or-registry-id>/<type>'.

tool_id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier, unique within the vendor namespace.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. NOT part of the hash preimage.

execution_hash.description: 'sha256:' + lowercase hex digest of SHA-256 over the canonical JSON of {policy_parameters, output_payload}. See §6.

chain.description: Provenance block. REQUIRED at L2. Forms a re-verifiable acyclic DAG.

parent_hashes.description: execution_hash strings of upstream artifacts consumed in this run.

parent_tool_ids.description: tool_id strings matching each parent hash, same order.

policy_parameters.description: The inputs that determined the decision, plus execution_backend. Part of the hash preimage. MUST NOT contain per-run varying values (timestamps, nonces) or real PII.

output_payload.description: The decision (verdict / score / verified mandate). Part of the hash preimage.

compliance_flags.description: Machine-readable flags raised by the run. MAY be empty.

audit_signature.description: Self-asserted execution properties. These are claims, not proofs — verification comes from re-execution (§6).

session_receipt_root.description: A SHA-256 Merkle root over a session's artifact hashes, set by an aggregator tool (§7.4). null when not aggregated.
